query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.billingPlatform
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.customerExternalId IN ('C0011', 'C0066', 'C2441', 'C9003', 'C0288')
ORDER BY bi.customerExternalId, bi.lineAmount DESC;
